heading_content_part: When you install Crumblyy, we generate a random unique ID for you which gets tagged to your device.This unique ID is used to identify you as a user by Crumblyy and save your bookmarked content on server.

decoder_heading: You may also sign-in on Crumblyy through an account you already have with Google.

heading_content_part: You may also sign-in on Crumblyy through an account you already have with Google. When you sign-in on Crumblyy through Google, we ask for your full name, email id, google account id and profile picture(collectively referred as “Personal Data”). All this information is used to set up your profile and create an account on our servers where you may back up your content.

decoder_heading: You may also sign-in on Crumblyy through an account you already have with Google.
ident_heading: You may also sign-in on Crumblyy through an account you already have with Google.
heading_content_part: We receive some other information automatically when you use Crumblyy. This includes data about your device, software, operating system, user-specific advertising IDs for advertisement tracking, your IP address and the date and time of each request you would make to Crumblyy.In order to enhance your experience on Crumblyy, we also collect information about how you interact with the content cards and advertisements on Crumblyy.

heading_content_part: Crumblyy also works with advertising partners to serve third-party advertisements on the platform. Crumblyy might also direct users to websites of third party content providers, when users choose to click on Read More button, swipe up card or click on card. We do not endorse and are not responsible for the privacy practices and content of such third parties. We encourage you to review their privacy policies to understand how they collect and process your Personally Identifiable Information.

Crumblyy will not share your personal data with anyone without your explicit authorization.

heading_content_part: Crumblyy may also share or transfer the control of your data when our business is sold, merged or transferred to others. This transfer of control and subsequent use of the data, however, will continue to be in accordance with this Privacy Policy. The new entity that buys fully or part of the business of Crumblyy will have the right to continue to use your data, but only in conformity with this Privacy Policy unless you agree otherwise.

decoder_heading: HOW WE PROTECT PRIVACY FOR CHILDREN
ident_heading: HOW WE PROTECT PRIVACY FOR CHILDREN
heading_content_part: HOW WE PROTECT PRIVACY FOR CHILDREN

decoder_heading: Our content is targeted to a general audience.
ident_heading: Our content is targeted to a general audience.
heading_content_part: Our content is targeted to a general audience. We do not knowingly target, collect, use or share information that could reasonably be used to identify children under the age of 15 without prior parental consent or consistent with applicable law. By using our service you confirm that you either are of legal age or have an applicable consent.

decoder_heading: HOW WE PROTECT YOUR DATA

heading_content_part: HOW WE PROTECT YOUR DATA

decoder_heading: Crumblyy will use all collected user data for security, fraud prevention and investigations as mandated by Indian law.
ident_heading: Crumblyy will use all collected user data for security, fraud prevention and investigations as mandated by Indian law
heading_content_part: Crumblyy will use all collected user data for security, fraud prevention and investigations as mandated by Indian law and in the interest of the integrity of its business. Crumblyy will use user data (including communications) for security purposes or to investigate possible fraud or violations of the User Agreement, this Privacy Policy or in the event of attempts to harm other users in the app.

decoder_heading: Crumblyy will use all collected user data for security, fraud prevention and investigations as mandated by Indian law.
ident_heading: Crumblyy will use all collected user data for security, fraud prevention and investigations as mandated by Indian law
heading_content_part: Crumblyy constantly monitors data logs and server activities to prevent security breaches, and vulnerabilities. Users must use security features available through our Services. We use encryptions to keep your data safe and try to maintain highest level of security. However, Crumblyy cannot warrant that user data may not be accessed, disclosed, altered, or destroyed by breach of any of our physical, technical, or managerial safeguards through illegal means. We will follow action as mandated by Indian law when such criminal breach occurs and will not be liable for any negligence in the event of such criminal act.
